headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录242篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究155篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API13篇。热门标签：Agent（64篇）。其中11%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ palmier-io /palmier-pro：macOS video editor built for AI

▸ calesthio /OpenMontage：World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skill

▸ DeusData /codebase-memory-mcp：High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph —

▸ google-research /timesfm：TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Goo

▸ twentyhq /twenty：The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
text: 今日共收录242篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究155篇, 开源项目44篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API13篇。热门标签：Agent（64篇）。其中11%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
